prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约15227→17057→17914→17945→16253，2021–2024年整体持续后移（数字增大），累计后移约2700名；2025年出现明显回升（数字减小 ），较2024年前移约1700名，显示报考热度在2025年有所回升。2025年基准位次约16253名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年逐年缩减：14→10→9→7→6人；2026年（§ 7）计划大幅回升至14人，较2025年扩招约133%，为近六年最高计划数。大幅扩招将显著降低竞争烈度，推动最低录取位次后移（数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流 建设高校；软科主榜2025年约第180名，2026年升至第177名，排名略有上升，整体处于全国中上水平；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及CUVA男排总决 赛中主场球迷干扰比赛争议（26条事件，11条负面），可能对报考心理产生轻微负面影响；抖音热度排名第18（高热），短视频曝光量大，有助于维持关注度；未见明显投档断档 记录；体育学为A+学科（第四轮评估），全国顶尖；运动人体科学、运动康复、体育经济与管理等专业直接对应体育学优势学科，对体育方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 数据科学与大数据技术、智能体育工程等工科专业对应计算机/电子信息大类（社会热度偏热）；应用心理学属心理学大类（热度平稳）；康复物理治 疗属医学技术类（热度平稳）。福建省2026年普通高考总人数约26.79万，较2025年（约25.23万）增长约6.2%；物理类考生按近年占比约76%估算约20.38万人，较2025年（19.21 万）增长约6.1%，竞争加剧。；北京体育大学位于北京市，属跨省招生；福建省非该校本地生源大省，近年招生计划波动较 大。2025年物理类计划仅6人，2026年扩至14人，扩招幅度远超全国平均，可能反映该校在福建的招生策略调整。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升趋势、2026年物理类计划 大幅扩招133%（主导因素，推动位次后移）、福建省物理类考生增长约6.1%（竞争加剧，部分抵消扩招效应）以及声誉偏负面（轻微降温），预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年明 显后移。预测最低位次约29055名，区间28555–29555名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招，位次区间较2025年明显后移。建议位次在28500–29500之间的考生以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可冲刺，三档专业保底。位次优于28555的考生可重 点冲刺数据科学与大数据技术、运动人体科学等一档专业。注意应用心理学、康复物理治疗等专业有体检限制条件。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 15227 → 17057 → 17914 → 17945 → 16253. From 2021 to 2024, the overall trend was a continuous backward shift (increasing numbers), with a cumulative backward shift of about 2700 places. In 2025, there was a significant rebound (decreasing numbers), moving forward by about 1700 places compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in application popularity in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 16253. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan has been shrinking year by year from 2021 to 2025: 14 → 10 → 9 → 7 → 6 students. In 2026 (§ 7), the plan significantly rebounds to 14 students, an increase of about 133% compared to 2025, the highest enrollment number in the past six years. The substantial expansion will significantly reduce competition intensity, pushing the minimum admission ranking backward (increasing numbers).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 180th in 2025 and rose to 177th in 2026, with a slight increase in ranking, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the CUVA Men's Volleyball Finals where home fans interfered with the match (26 events, 11 negative), which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure, helping to maintain attention. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. Sports Science is an A+ discipline (fourth round evaluation), top in the country. Sports Human Science, Sports Rehabilitation, Sports Economics and Management, and other majors directly correspond to the advantageous disciplines of sports science, strongly attracting candidates interested in sports.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology and Intelligent Sports Engineering correspond to the Computer/Electronic Information category (socially hot). Applied Psychology belongs to the Psychology category (stable popularity). Rehabilitation Physical Therapy belongs to the Medical Technology category (stable popularity). In Fujian Province, the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025 (approximately 252,300). Physics Category candidates, estimated at about 76% of the total in recent years, are approximately 203,800, an increase of about 6.1% compared to 2025 (192,100), intensifying competition. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial enrollment. Fujian Province is not a major local source province for this university, and the enrollment plan has fluctuated significantly in recent years. In 2025, the Physics Category plan was only 6 students, expanding to 14 in 2026, with an expansion rate far exceeding the national average, possibly reflecting an adjustment in the university's enrollment strategy in Fujian.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 Physics Category plan by 133% (dominant factor, pushing rankings backward), the increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates by about 6.1% (intensified competition, partially offsetting the expansion effect), and the slightly negative reputation (slight cooling), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 29055, with a range of 28555–29555.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Sports Human Science
- Intelligent Sports Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Sports Rehabilitation
- Rehabilitation Physical Therapy
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Applied Psychology (Color blindness and color weakness are not admitted)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category has significantly expanded, and the ranking range has clearly shifted backward compared to 2025. It is recommended that candidates with rankings between 28500 and 29500 mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings better than 28555 can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology and Sports Human Science. Note that majors like Applied Psychology and Rehabilitation Physical Therapy have physical examination restrictions.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2868 → 2901 → 2913 → 2948 → 3408. From 2021 to 2024, they remained stable between 2868 and 2948 (fluctuation of about 80 places). In 2025, there was a significant backward shift (increase in number), moving back about 460 places compared to 2024, indicating a notable decline in application popularity in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3408. The provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 has been continuously and sharply reduced: 13 → 12 → 10 → 7 → 4 students. In 2026, the plan slightly increases to 5 students, a 25% expansion compared to 2025, but still at a historical low. The slight expansion will mildly reduce competition intensity, pushing the ranking slightly further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2025 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 180th, rising to 177th in 2026, with a slight increase in ranking, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the CUVA Men's Volleyball Finals where home fans interfered with the match, potentially having a slight negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure, helping to maintain attention. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Sports Science is an A+ discipline (fourth round evaluation), top in the country. The Sports Economics and Management major directly corresponds to the advantageous sports discipline, strongly attracting sports-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Network and New Media belongs to the Journalism and Communication category (social popularity clearly discouraged, Zhang Xuefeng effect continues). Chinese International Education belongs to the Chinese Language and Literature category (popularity slightly hot). Marxist Theory belongs to the Marxist Theory category (popularity stable). Tourism Management belongs to the Business Administration category (clearly discouraged). In Fujian Province, the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025. History Category candidates, estimated at about 24% of the total in recent years, are approximately 64,100, an increase of about 6.4% compared to 2025 (60,300), intensifying competition. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment. Fujian Province is not a major local source province for this university. In recent years, the History Category plan has been continuously reduced to 4 students before slightly recovering to 5, with a very small enrollment scale, making rankings susceptible to fluctuations due to individual candidate application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the 25% slight expansion of the History Category plan in 2026 (pushing rankings back), the approximately 6.4% increase in Fujian History Category candidates (intensifying competition, partially offsetting the expansion effect), and the slightly negative reputation (mild cooling), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift back but with limited magnitude. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3889, with a range of 3389–4389.
